---
title: "Dataset Audit"
format: html
execute:
  echo: true
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{r}
source("../R/00_config.R")
```

# Goal

Create Table 1: public transcriptomic cohorts and endpoint harmonization.

# Tasks

1. Verify GEO accession.
2. Extract sample metadata.
3. Harmonize pCR/RD labels.
4. Check for overlapping samples.
5. Lock discovery and validation roles.
